title: Error Envelope
description: Standardized error envelope for failure events and error responses across the Pulse platform. Used in event payloads when an operation fails (e.g., track.upload.failed, track.petrified.failed). See EVENT_ARCHITECTURE.md §2 payload conventions.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the error occurred.

service.description: Name of the service that produced the error (e.g., 'soundgarden', 'petrified', 'fort-minor').

correlationId.description: Pipeline correlation ID for tracing this error back to the originating workflow.

details.description: Additional error context. Structure varies by error type.

examples.message: File exceeds maximum allowed size of 50MB
